title: Invoice schema
description: A schema for retrieving available endpoints of invoices.

drafts.description: A reference to all unbooked invoices.

booked.description: A reference to all booked invoices.

paid.description: A reference to all paid invoices. Paid invoices are invoices that has no remaining unpaid amount.

unpaid.description: A reference to all unpaid invoices. unpaid invoices are invoices that has a remaining unpaid amount

overdue.description: A reference to all overdue invoices. Overdue invoices are unpaid invoices where due date has been surpassed.

notDue.description: A reference to all not due invoices. Not due invoices are invoices where due date still hasn't been surpassed. This includes invoices that are due today.

sent.description: A reference to all sent invoices.

totals.description: A reference to the totals of all invoices.

self.description: A reference to the invoice resource.
